assertions.notes: 7 matches project; 1128 game_plays produced by GRE session manager flush (#807 fix + #808 replay support). PlaysByMatch returns non-empty timeline. The game_plays > 0 assertion in TestLayer5ReplayInjector_Reconstruct guards against the #807 regression class (partial GRE flush with no match_id) going undetected.

corpus_promotion.note: Rebuilt post-#807: GRE session manager wired into replay package; 1128 game_plays projected from 36 raw log files. Draft data (draft.started/draft.completed/draft.pick) DLQ with missing session_id pending #772.
